attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_BOM_REFERENCE_DESIGNATORS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.COMPONENT_REFERENCE_DESIGNATOR, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.REF_DESIGNATOR_COMMENT, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.CHANGE_NOTICE, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ACD_TYPE, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.COMMON_COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS,
 (
 select COMPONENT_REFERENCE_DESIGNATOR ,COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID ,ACD_TYPE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS
 minus
 select COMPONENT_REFERENCE_DESIGNATOR ,COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID ,ACD_TYPE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_BOM_REFERENCE_DESIGNATORS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.COMPONENT_REFERENCE_DESIGNATOR = STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.COMPONENT_REFERENCE_DESIGNATOR and ACM.COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID = STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID and COALESCE(ACM.ACD_TYPE,-999) = COALESCE(STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.ACD_TYPE,-999) and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_BOM_REF_DESIGNATORS.REFRESH_DATETIME
